label: Large Language Models
description: Cutting-edge LLM repositories covering training, fine-tuning, inference, and deployment of large language models including GPT, LLaMA, Mistral, and more.

label: AI Agents
description: Autonomous AI agent frameworks, tools, and projects enabling multi-step reasoning, tool use, and goal-directed behavior powered by LLMs.

label: RAG & Retrieval
description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, vector search pipelines, and knowledge retrieval frameworks that ground LLMs in external data sources.

label: Vector Databases
description: Vector database engines, embedding stores, and similarity search libraries powering semantic search, recommendations, and AI memory systems.

label: Prompt Engineering
description: Prompt templates, prompt management platforms, chain-of-thought libraries, and tools for crafting, testing, and optimizing AI prompts at scale.

label: Fine-Tuning
description: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning techniques including LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT, and full fine-tuning scripts for adapting foundation models to custom tasks.
githubQuery: topic:fine-tuning OR topic:lora OR topic:qlora stars:>50

label: Multimodal AI
description: Vision-language models, image-text generation, audio-visual AI, and multimodal foundation models capable of reasoning across text, images, and more.

label: AI Infrastructure
description: MLOps platforms, AI infrastructure tooling, model serving systems, experiment tracking, and deployment pipelines for production AI at scale.

label: AI Frameworks
description: High-level AI application frameworks including LangChain, LlamaIndex, Haystack, and orchestration tools for building LLM-powered applications.
githubQuery: topic:langchain OR topic:llamaindex OR topic:haystack stars:>50

label: Open-Source LLMs
description: Fully open-source large language model implementations, weights, and inference engines including LLaMA, Mistral, Falcon, and community fine-tunes.
githubQuery: topic:open-source-llm OR topic:llama OR topic:mistral stars:>50

label: AI Datasets
description: Curated AI training datasets, NLP benchmarks, annotation tools, and dataset curation pipelines used to train and evaluate language and vision models.

label: AI Evaluation
description: LLM evaluation frameworks, benchmarking suites, red-teaming tools, and automated testing pipelines for measuring model quality and safety.

label: AI Safety
description: AI alignment research code, interpretability tools, robustness libraries, and safety-focused evaluation frameworks for responsible AI development.

label: AI Applications
description: End-user AI applications, chatbots, AI-powered productivity tools, coding assistants, and domain-specific AI apps built on top of foundation models.
